svg.title: SahayogHub Feature Overview Card
svg.desc: Feature card image showing six core features of SahayogHub on a white background

text.style: fill:rgb(17, 17, 17);stroke:none;color:rgb(0, 0, 0);stroke-width:1px;stroke-linecap:butt;stroke-linejoin:miter;opacity:1;font-family:"Noto Sans Devanagari", Mangal, "Arial Unicode MS", sans-serif;font-size:28px;font-weight:300;text-anchor:middle;dominant-baseline:auto
